---
title: "Next Generation Sequencing in Seoul CMC"
author: "Jun Kang"
date: '2019 6 11 '
output:
  
  slidy_presentation: default
  ioslides_presentation: default
  beamer_presentation: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

---

## NGS system  

---

## Second slide

---

## Third slide
